# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
      name: myNSG
      type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
      properties:
        location: eastus
        securityRules:
          - name: RDP
            priority: 1001
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: *
            destinationPortRange: 3389
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
          - name: SSH
            priority: 1002
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: *
            destinationPortRange: 22
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
          - name: HTTP
            priority: 1003
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: *
            destinationPortRange: 80
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
          - name: HTTPS
            priority: 1004
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: *
            destinationPortRange: 443
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
